code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{supabase}from'../supabaseClient';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const WordCloud=()=>{const[words,setWords]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchWords=async()=>{const{data}=await supabase.from('proposals').select('content').limit(30);if(data){const text=data.map(p=>p.content).join(' ');const common=['le','la','les','de','des','et','est','sont','pour','dans','avec','que','qui','une','pas','plus'];const freq={};text.toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).forEach(w=>{if(w.length>3&&!common.includes(w))freq[w]=(freq[w]||0)+1;});const sorted=Object.entries(freq).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,20);setWords(sorted.map(_ref=>{let[w,c]=_ref;return{word:w,size:16+Math.min(c*2,48)};}));}else{setWords([{word:"Élections",size:36},{word:"Justice",size:32},{word:"Mandat",size:28},{word:"Constitution",size:40},{word:"Décentralisation",size:26},{word:"Gouvernance",size:30}]);}};fetchWords();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"word-cloud",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Nuage de mots-cl\xE9s"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Analyse s\xE9mantique des contributions citoyennes"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cloud",children:words.map((w,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"cloud-word",style:{fontSize:w.size},children:w.word},i))})]});};export default WordCloud;
